data.content: Implementation complete on commit 52001ba4. Key additions are src/lib/settings-dispatch-targets.ts and scripts/dispatch-pools.sh for shared bundled target metadata; Settings and foolery setup now expose grouped workflow targets with Add to all and workflow-specific pools; runtime step-agent resolution now prefers workflow-aware target ids with legacy fallback; coverage covers target derivation, pool fallback, setup writer and interactive flows, and settings grouping wiring. All quality gates passed: lint, tsc, test, build.
